mechanism: High vol-of-correlation (oscillation between -0.30 and +0.30 on 3-6 month frequency) whipsaws mean-optimized portfolios while rewarding barbell construction that is convex in both tails. The reflexive amplification through vol-targeting strategies ($500B-$1T AUM) makes the oscillation self-reinforcing.
regime_dependence: Active during the current oscillating/transitional regime. Would diminish if correlation stabilized in either direction for an extended period.
